gt_sql: SELECT Text FROM comments WHERE PostId IN ( SELECT Id FROM posts WHERE ViewCount BETWEEN 100 AND 150 ) ORDER BY Score DESC LIMIT 1

Otherwise, yes, a percentage can be as close to zero as you can imagine because it is bounded between 0 and 100 and continuous on that interval.

pred_sql:
SELECT c.Text
FROM comments c
JOIN posts p ON c.PostId = p.Id
WHERE p.ViewCount BETWEEN 100 AND 150
ORDER BY c.Score DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: Among the posts with views ranging from 100 to 150, what is the comment with the highest score?
